body: Sawer's filter models the aggressive, gritty character of the Soviet Polivoks synth, available at 12 or 24 dB/octave in LP/BP/HP. Pushing resonance is where its distinctive bite comes from, which suits raw leads and basses.

Saw, sub and noise oscillators feed hard sync for tearing, formant-like leads, and 8-voice unison widens the result. A modulation matrix routes LFOs and envelopes to taste, with vintage-voiced chorus, phaser, delay and reverb to finish.
